titleStmt.title: SII 11.172: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 172. (B.K. No. 68 of 1926-27.) SIRŌḶ, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE ŚIVA TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription which is damaged and mutilated belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and refers to the rule of Mahāsāmanta Mallarasa of the Sinda family and Kūnnula race, who is described as the lord of the city of Bhōgāvatī and the champion of his father (Ayyan-aṅkakāṟa). It registers the gift of a garden made by three Gāvuṇḍas to the god Mūlasthānadēva, of cess by the Five Hundred merchants and the Nakara, the Dōṇi One-Thousand and Ugura Three-Hundred (bodies). It also records similar gifts made to the same god by the toll officers, Karaṇas, and the betel-leaf merchants (Tambuliga Seṭṭis).
The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 46, Plava, [Jyēshṭha, śu.] 8, Thursday, which regularly corresponds to A.D. 1121, May 26, Thursday; ·68.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamū
lastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahā
rājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyā
bharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyā
nadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānajapasamādhiśīḷasaṁpannaruṁ vibudhaprasannaruṁ
śiṣṭajanasaṁtarppaṇa pārjjitāgaṇyapuṇyaruṁ vibudhāśra
ramaṇacaraṇaikaśaraṇaruṁ kāḷamukhasamayasamuddharaṇaruṁ
saccaritahṛdayadīrgghikāsankrīḍitamanōmarāḷaruṁ śivadrōhakuḷa
viḷayakāḷānaḷaruṁ vidvajjanamanaḥkumudamahīramaṇaruṁ dhairyyāvaṣṭaṁbha
ratiramaṇaruṁ viśuddhadhyānasūtrā ḷākṣamā
ḷōduvarttanacaturtthamaṁtra nirataruṁ sakaḷaviśayānu
viśadayaśa rdigvarttitakīrtti gaḷumappa śrīmaturudraśaktipaṁḍi
tadēvara . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāsāmanta vīraś®kāntaṁ bhōgā
vatīpuravarādhīśvara phaṇipatākēsvara siṁdakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa semarapracaṁ
ḍaṁ kaliyugabhīmaṁ vīrāvatāranuṁ
koḷuguḷa kūḍi tappuvaragaṁḍa visamahayārūḍhaprauḍharēvante kūnnu lānva
yaprakhyāta mugudhāṁganācittacōra paranārīdūra vairi manneya
baṁgāṟa Ayyanaṁkakāṟa nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāsāmanta ma
llarasaru © svasti
saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararuṁ vairimadabhaṁjanaruṁ bhōgapuraṁdararuṁ tyāgavi
nōdaruṁ sujanaprasannaruṁ nuḍidumattennaruṁ gōtrapavitraruṁ Āś®tajanaka
lvavrikṣaruṁ śrīmūlasthānadēvapādārādhakarumappa
llagāvuṇḍa mācagāvuṇḍa mū
varu gāvuṇḍugaḷu miṟdu ś®maccāḷukyavikramakā
lada 46 neya plavasaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa sudha Aṣṭami brihavāradandu śrīmū
lasthānadēvarige biṭṭa tōṭa mā Ūriṁ teṁkadāriyiṁ mūḍalu sarbbā
bādhaparihāramāgi biṭṭaru . mattaṁ Ūrindaṁ paḍuvalu kariya keyya sarbba
bādhaparihāramāgi biṭṭa mattaru 2 dēvara koḷagadāya hoṁ 1 koḷaga
bhattavaṁ tiṟuvaru . mēṁṭiyalu Aḍḍa tōṁṭadalu Aḍḍavaṁ biṭṭaru . svastisa
mastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritacārucāritranayavinayavīrabaḷaṁja
dharmmapratipāḷa guḍḍadhvajavirājitamānōnnataruṁ khaṇḍaḷīmūlabhadrōdbhava
ruṁ bhalākadaṇḍahastaruṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararuṁ vairibhēruṁḍaruṁ paṁ
casatagōtrānvayaru(ṁ) mappainūrvvaruṁ nakaramu miḻdu biṭṭa dharma māvudeṁda
ḍe sārige Okkalalu batta koḷaga 1 Eḷḷu Uppu gōdhuve kaḍale baḷḷa 2 Aṁga
ḍiya Okkalalu Aḍḍa sallage soṁṭige Eraḍu ntinitumaṁ dēvargge biṭṭaru .
mattaṁ dōṇisāsirvvara negartte Eṁteṁdaḍe . nuḍidagu vudaridu nuḍidaḍe mriḍa
karṇnana vacanaṁ kaḍeda siḷāsāsanamane nuḍidēvaṇnisuve dōṇisā
sirvvarumaṁ . matta dōṇisāsirvvaru dōṇiyalu Aḍḍava nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ
biṭṭaru . mattaṁ jaragina teṟe yarasugaḷu Oṁdu dōṇiya teṟeyumuṁ sarvvā
bādhāparihāravāgi dēvargge biṭṭaru . mattaṁ bāvige sarvvabādhāparihāramāgi bi
ṭṭa dōṇi 1 mattaṁ Ugura mūnūrvvara negartte Eṁteṁdaḍe . siḍilaneḍagalipa rēḷuṁ
kaḍalaṁ dāṁṭalke bageva raṁjade naṁjaṁ kuḍiyalkoḍarisuva raḷkade piḍivaru phaṇi
patiya nenipa rugura beḍaṁgaru . Intenisi dugura mūnūrvvaru Ēṇiyalu A
ḍḍava nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭaru . pejjuṁkada verggaḍe karaṇaṁgaḷu biṭṭa dharmma
māudeṁdaḍe kuḷiya suṁkadākāraṇeyiṁ biṭṭa tōṁṭa 1 . taṁbuliga seṭṭiyaruṁ bi
ṭṭa dharmma māudeṁdaḍe hēriṁge vīsa 1 ma nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭaru . dēvara gāṇa
baṇnige ḍonki bīravaṇa sarvvabādhāparihāravāgi biṭṭaru . Aivatto
ṇada laḍḍavuṁ soṁṭige Eṇnevaṁ biṭṭaru . Intī dharmmavaṁ prati
pāḷisidavargge gaṁge gaṁgāsāgara śrīparvvatameṁba tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāīra ka
vileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷu kaṭṭisi mahāritvijargge koṭṭa puṇyamakku
Intīdharmmama naḷidavargge vāraṇāsi gurukṣētra gaṁge śrīparvvata meṁ
ba tīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu kavileyuvaṁ brāhmaṇaruṁ tapōdhanaruma(ṁ) naḷide pāta
kanakkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrā
ṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu rnṛpāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāginaṟpā
rtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yā mabhadrā . śrīmatu kēra
tikabbedēvara ka koṭṭagadyāṇa 17 . ©
Digital edition of SII 11.172 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
